changelogversion.changelogtext: [b]Improved: Release Signing[/b]
APK is now signed with a dedicated production keystore for app store distribution (APKPure, Uptodown, etc.)
[b]New: Privacy Policy[/b]
Added an official Privacy Policy page for app store compliance
[b]Improved: Build Configuration[/b]
Smart ABI split detection — automatically disables splits for bundle tasks
[b]Under the Hood[/b]
JDK 21 compatibility for more stable builds
Cleaned up gitignore for keystore and sensitive files
[b]New: Backup Before Update[/b]
Added a backup button in the update dialog and update screen so you can safely backup before updating
[b]New: Custom Library Header[/b]
Redesigned Library top UI with a large header and total entries count
[b]Improved: Library Categories[/b]
Category tabs have been completely revamped into sleek, pill-shaped chips with checkmark indicators
[b]Improved: Default Grid Size[/b]
Changed the default portrait library grid size from 2 to 3 columns for better content density
[b]Fixed: Updates Carousel Localization[/b]
Fixed an issue where "Updates" and "See More" texts in the Library Carousel were hardcoded and ignored language settings
[b]Under the Hood[/b]
Configured APK generation naming convention to automatically include version and ABI architecture
[b]Documentation Migration[/b]
Replaced all external mihon.app help and docs URLs with native udink.me/koma documentation links
[b]New: Repo Finder Maintenance Mode[/b]
Repositories in the Repo Finder can now be marked as under maintenance, displaying a badge and preventing installation
[b]Fixed: Repo Finder Error[/b]
Resolved a 404 error in the Repo Finder by updating the repository index URL endpoint
[b]New: Library Updates Carousel[/b]
Recent chapter updates now appear directly in the Library tab with a quick "See More" shortcut
[b]New: Updates Calendar[/b]
Added an inline compact calendar to the Updates screen showing upcoming releases at a glance
[b]Improved: Compact Calendar Layout[/b]
Reduced calendar size with smaller fonts and tighter spacing so updates list stays visible
[b]Fixed: Double Splash Screen[/b]
Eliminated the old splash icon that would briefly flash after the branded KOMA splash animation
[b]Improved: Navigation Bar[/b]
Redesigned bottom navigation bar with cleaner styling and better visual balance for a more comfortable experience
[b]Updated: Help & Support[/b]
Help tab now directs to the official KOMA repository at udink.me/koma/
[b]Build & Stability[/b]
Fixed force close on some Android versions caused by conflicting splash screen initialization
Fixed duplicate import compilation errors in LibraryTab
Cleaned up deprecated and conflicting import references
[b]New: Extension Repo Shortcut[/b]
Added a Floating Action Button to the Extensions tab for quick and easy access to repository management
[b]UI Polish[/b]
Integrated the new FAB with responsive padding to avoid overlap with library content
Enhanced navigation flow for adding and managing extension sources
[b]Bug Fixes[/b]
Fix overscroll stretch causing items to become untappable on the More screen
Fix bottom navigation bar clipping content on the More screen
Add debug build variant support for Google Services
Show What's New button in all build types
[b]Improvements[/b]
Improved touch target accuracy after scroll boundary interactions
Proper contentPadding handling for ScrollbarLazyColumn
Updated changelog to reflect KOMA release history
[b]Complete Rebrand & Redesign[/b]
Transitioned from the legacy Tachiyomi/Mihon base into a fresh, standalone premium experience
[b]Modern "Floating Island" Navigation[/b]
Swapped the old edge-to-edge bottom bar with a sleek, translucent floating pill that lets your library content glide beautifully underneath
[b]Premium Library Grid[/b]
Replaced sharp UI elements with smooth rounded corners, spacious padding, and deep glassmorphism text-gradients for a high-end visual experience
[b]Refined Typography & Badges[/b]
Perfected cover badges and text weights to ensure maximum readability and a clean, modern aesthetic
[b]Midnight Deep Theme[/b]
A brand new, sleek dark theme with vibrant cyan accents for comfortable reading
[b]Optimized Build[/b]
Removed old legacy assets, fixed crash loops on missing icons, and streamlined the app repository
APKs are now natively signed and ready to install — no manual signing required
[b]Welcome to KOMA (コマ)![/b]
Your new premium manga, comic, and webtoon reader
[b]Core Features[/b]
Advanced library management with custom categories
Custom extensions support for unlimited sources
Automatic webtoon detection for optimal reading
Built-in tracking support (MAL, AniList, and more)
Cross-device sync support
Every chapter. Everywhere.
